confirmDescriptions: Ready to see if you crushed the leaderboard?
Your fingers did the work, let's see the results!
Legends never back down... except to check their score.
Think you nailed it? Prove it!
Final boss defeated. Time for stats! 🏆
Your adventure ends here... for today!
Real gamers aren't afraid of the scoreboard.
Respawn tomorrow, but first... the verdict!
Save your progress and face the music!

home.title: The Box
home.subtitle: Daily video game challenges with screenshot guessing, speed-based scoring, 21 achievements to unlock, live leaderboards, and win streaks. Play instantly as a guest or create an account.

features.panoramaDesc: Can you name the game from a single screenshot? Put your gaming knowledge to the test!
features.dailyDesc: New puzzle every day. Same challenge worldwide — climb the global leaderboard!
features.multiplayerDesc: Challenge friends in real-time battles with live scoring

achievements.heading: Achievements waiting to be unlocked
achievements.subheading: Three trophies you don't have yet. Yet.

perfect: Absolute perfection! You're a living legend! 🏆
Perfect score! Other players tremble before your mastery! 👑
Welcome to the screenshot ninjas. We do this again tomorrow. 👑
excellent: Impressive! You really know your stuff! 🌟
Excellent score! You're on the path to glory! 🚀
Well done champion! This score deserves respect! 💪
You played with the screenshot ninjas today. 🔥
good: Not bad at all! A very respectable score! 👍
Well played! You've proven you know your classics! 🎯
Solid. The screenshot ninjas recognize their own. 🤝
average: That was... interesting! Next time will be the one! 😅
Well, you tried! It's the taking part that counts, right? 🤷
You made some... creative choices! Come back tomorrow for revenge! 🎲
Not glorious, but even screenshot ninjas have off days. 🎲
low: Uh... did you recognize at least one game? Tomorrow will definitely be better! 😬
Looks like you played with your eyes closed! Some training is needed! 🙈
Courage! Even the pros started somewhere... very low! 💀
Even screenshot ninjas fall sometimes. See you tomorrow. 💀

geo.title: Geo Moderation
geo.subtitle: Curate the Geo daily challenge: import sources, schedule challenges, and review crowdsourced submissions.

tabs.catalogDescription: Curate playable games and their reference maps: activate titles and adjust the maps used in-game.
tabs.acquisitionDescription: Run and monitor the map ingestion pipeline that pulls from external sources (registry, Fandom, Wikidata…).
tabs.queueDescription: Moderate community-submitted pin proposals: promote, reposition, or reject pending screenshots.
tabs.reportsDescription: Resolve player reports: misplaced pins, stale maps, or problematic content.

addMap.title: Add a map — {{name}}
addMap.description: Pick a source to import the reference map.
addMap.descriptionReplace: Replace the active map with a new source.

catalog.title: Game catalog
catalog.subtitle: Click an enabled game to inspect its tier ingestion. Use the filter pills to pivot between enabled, missing-map, candidate, or all games.
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search a game by name or studio…

strip.pinsAria: Jump to the submissions awaiting review

no-curated.title: No curated games yet
no-curated.body: Curate one or more games for Geo. Once curated, the pipeline imports their maps automatically.

no-maps.title: No maps imported yet

games.subtitle: Curate the games whose maps and screenshots should land in the Geo daily challenge. Select multiple to curate or remove in bulk.

bulk.removedMessage_one: Removed {{count}} game from the curated set.

games.noMapLikelyTooltip: Genres ({{genres}}) suggest this game has no world map. Auto-ingestion will probably fail; consider manual upload only.

maps.empty: No curated games yet. Add some from the curated list in the Submissions tab.

row.mapCountTooltip: Number of enabled maps for this game

tierStatus.eligibleHint: Will run on the next ingest tick.
tierStatus.retryNowTooltip: Clear this source's tombstone and re-run the pipeline for this game.
tierStatus.retryQueued: Retry queued. The pipeline will pick it up shortly.
tierStatus.runNowTooltip: Kick off this single source's import immediately, without waiting for the next ingest tick.
tierStatus.runNowQueued: Tier queued. The import will start shortly.
tierStatus.useThisMapTooltip: Set this map as the active one for the game.
tierStatus.candidatePreviewAria: Candidate map preview (click to open full size)

actions.rerunTooltip: Clears every per-tier failure tombstone for this game and re-runs the full pipeline (metadata + maps). More aggressive than "Run for this game", which respects existing tombstones.
actions.researchTooltip: Open pre-filled search links (Google, StrategyWiki, Fextralife…)
actions.importWandTooltip: Paste a wand.com map URL — the server will scrape its og:image and record it as the map for this game.
actions.viewCapturesTooltip: Open the Submissions tab filtered to this game's captures.
actions.uncurateTooltip: Drop this game from the Geo selection. It won't appear in daily challenges anymore. You can re-enable it from the Games tab.

dialog.title: Remove this game from Geo?
dialog.description: "{{name}}" will stop appearing in daily Geo challenges. Existing maps and captures are kept; the game can be re-enabled from the Games tab.

sidePanel.hint: Pick a game on the left to see its tier-by-tier ingestion state.
sidePanel.noActive: No active map yet — see tier states below.
sidePanel.previewAlt: Active map for {{name}} (click to open full size)
sidePanel.pipelineSubtitle: Source cascade — the first match becomes the active map.

multi.disableLastBlocked: Cannot disable the last enabled map for a game.

research.title: Research a map for {{name}}
research.description: Pre-filled search links — open one in a new tab, copy a usable image URL, then come back here to upload it.

geo.fetchMoreQueued: Fetch queued. New captures will appear here as soon as they are ingested.
geo.pickPointForOfficial: Click to set a location, or validate without a pin to use the average of submissions
geo.pickPointRequired: No submissions to average — click the map to set a location.
geo.detailHintOfficial: Pick a submission from the list to review it and set its official location.
geo.alreadyOfficial: Official location already set — remove it to re-pin somewhere else.

guide.title: Moderation guide
guide.step1Body: Pick the games that should feed the Geo challenge in the Games tab. The ingestion pipeline then pulls their maps (Registry → Fandom → StrategyWiki → Fextralife → Wikidata → Manual) and Steam screenshots in the background.
guide.step2Body: Watch maps land tier by tier in the Maps tab. Re-run the pipeline or upload a map manually for any game still missing one.
guide.step3Body: Players send submissions guessing where each screenshot was taken. When they converge, set an official location — the Schedule button at the top will then queue the next validated screenshot for the daily challenge.

declineDialog.title: Decline this capture?
declineDialog.description: The capture will be removed from the Geo challenge: contributors won't see it anymore and it will never be picked for the daily challenge. Use for captures with no locatable spot (UI, inventory, loading screen…).

removeOfficialDialog.title: Remove official location?
removeOfficialDialog.description: This capture will return to the moderation queue. Players' submissions are kept; you'll be able to set a new official location.

health.title: Geo dataset health
health.subtitle: The pipeline auto-ingests maps and screenshots for games flagged as curated. No manual action required.

coverage.label: Map coverage
coverage.value: {{withMap}} / {{curated}} curated games have a map ({{total}} games total)

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Rare overrides — the ingester handles the rest.

curatedList.title: Curated games
curatedList.empty: No games in the curated set yet. Add some from the suggestions below.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Popular games not yet curated (sorted by Metacritic).

manualMap.title: Manual map for "{{name}}"
manualMap.description: Last-resort upload when the registry, Fandom, and Wikidata sources didn't produce a usable map. The image must be hosted on a stable URL — no upload happens here.
manualMap.descriptionReplace: Replace the active map for this game. The previous map is deactivated; existing screenshot pins remain valid because coordinates are normalized.

fields.regionHint: Leave empty if this is the canonical / world / mosaic map.

errors.required: Image URL, width, height, and license are required.

wandMap.title: Import from Wand for "{{name}}"
wandMap.description: Paste the wand.com map page URL. The server fetches the page and records its og:image as the map. Wand maps are stored with attribution-only license.
wandMap.descriptionReplace: Replace the active map for this game with a Wand-sourced one. The previous map is deactivated; existing screenshot pins remain valid because coordinates are normalized.

fields.regionHint: Leave empty if this is the canonical / world / mosaic map.

errors.notWandUrl: URL must be hosted on wand.com.

run.allTooltip: Runs metadata resolution and ingestion for every curated game.
run.allQueued: Pipeline started for every curated game.
run.tierRunningHint: Job queued or in flight — the live status will refresh in a few seconds.

reset.title: Danger zone — reset scraping
reset.subtitle: Wipes map and screenshot ingestion progress so the pipeline starts from zero. Curation flags (curated games) and player scores are kept.
reset.success: Scraping reset: {{importStates}} import states, {{ingestFailures}} failures, {{challenges}} geo challenges, {{maps}} maps deleted.

dialog.title: Confirm reset
dialog.body: This action is irreversible. The daily geo challenge will return "no challenge" until a new map is imported and a challenge is scheduled.

bullets.importStates: Tracks every import state (RAWG: games, screenshots).
bullets.ingestFailures: Clears ingestion failure tombstones (Fandom, Wikidata, Steam, registry).
bullets.maps: Deletes every ingested map and its candidate screenshots.
bullets.metadata: Resets games' geo metadata to "pending" so the resolver re-runs.

growth.topReferrersHint: Players driving the most signups this period

challenges.rerollDesc: Replace the 10 screenshots with new random ones. Players who already played will not be able to replay.
challenges.rerollSuccess: Daily challenge screenshots have been rerolled

import.gamesSectionDesc: Fetch game metadata and screenshot URLs from RAWG API. This creates the list of games and their screenshots to download.
import.screenshotsSectionDesc: Download the actual screenshot images to local storage. Requires Step 1 to be completed first.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.importGamesDesc: Fetches popular games from RAWG (based on Metacritic score) with metadata. Games already in the database are automatically skipped.
jobs.importScreenshotsDesc: Downloads all screenshot images referenced in the database to local storage

descriptions.createDailyChallenge: Automatically creates a new daily challenge with high-quality games (Metascore ≥ 85). Users can participate in a new challenge every day.
descriptions.scheduleDailyGeoChallenge: Schedules the daily Geo challenge by picking a random promoted screenshot. Idempotent: re-running does not replace an already-scheduled challenge.
descriptions.syncAllGames: Synchronizes the entire game database with the RAWG API to keep information up-to-date (ratings, screenshots, metadata).
descriptions.cleanupAnonymousUsers: Removes inactive anonymous user accounts to optimize the database and free up space.
descriptions.clearDailyData: Clears all game session data for the current day's daily challenge. This allows users to replay the challenge.
descriptions.recalculateScores: Recalculates scores for all completed game sessions using the current scoring algorithm. Ensures historical data reflects the latest scoring rules.
descriptions.streakRiskEmail: Sends an alert email to players whose daily streak is about to expire, encouraging them to come back and play.
descriptions.relanceEmail: Sends a re-engagement email to registered users who haven't played yet, encouraging them to try their first challenge.
descriptions.inactiveUserReminder: Sends a win-back email to long-inactive users to invite them back to the platform.

syncConflict.title: Sync Job Already Running
syncConflict.description: A sync-all job is already in progress or paused. Would you like to cancel it and start a new one?

fullImport.title: Full RAWG Import
fullImport.description: Import all games with Metacritic score >= threshold (batch processing with pause/resume)

legal.termsIntro: Welcome to The Box. By using our service, you agree to these terms.
legal.termsAcceptance: By accessing The Box, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our service.
legal.termsService: The Box is a guessing game based on video game screenshots. The service offers daily challenges and multiplayer modes.
legal.termsAccount: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
legal.termsContent: Screenshots used in the game are the property of their respective publishers. The Box does not claim any rights to this content and uses it for educational and entertainment purposes.
legal.termsConduct: You agree not to cheat, exploit bugs, or engage in behavior that harms other players' experience.
legal.termsModification: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the site.
legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
legal.privacyCollection: We collect information you provide during registration (email, username) as well as your game scores and statistics.
legal.privacyUsage: Your data is used to manage your account, display leaderboards, and improve our services. We never sell your personal data.
legal.privacyCookies: We use essential cookies for site functionality (session, language preferences). No advertising cookies are used.
legal.privacySecurity: We implement security measures to protect your data, including password encryption and secure HTTPS connections.
legal.privacyRights: In accordance with GDPR, you can request access, modification, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us.
legal.privacyContact: For any questions regarding this policy, contact us via our contact page.
legal.contactIntro: Have a question, suggestion, or problem? We're here to help.
legal.contactSocial: Follow us for the latest news and updates.
legal.contactBug: If you encounter a technical issue, please provide as much detail as possible to help us resolve it.
legal.contactResponseTime: We aim to respond within 48 hours.
legal.cookiesIntro: This policy explains how The Box uses cookies and similar technologies.
legal.cookiesWhat: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.
legal.cookiesTypes: We use only essential cookies required for the site to function properly. These include session cookies for authentication and preference cookies for language settings.
legal.cookiesEssential: These cookies are necessary for the website to work and cannot be disabled. They include: session tokens for login, language preferences, and game progress tracking.
legal.cookiesManage: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect site functionality. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
legal.cookiesChanges: We may update this cookie policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
legal.faqIntro: Find answers to common questions about The Box.
legal.faqAnswer1: The Box is a game where you guess video games from screenshots. Challenge yourself with daily puzzles or compete with friends in multiplayer mode.
legal.faqAnswer2: Look at the screenshot carefully, then type your guess for the game name. The faster you answer correctly, the more points you earn!
legal.faqQuestion3: Do I need an account to play?
legal.faqAnswer3: You can play as a guest, but creating an account allows you to save your scores, appear on leaderboards, and track your progress over time.
legal.faqAnswer4: Your score is based on accuracy and speed. Correct answers earn points, with bonus points for faster responses. Each round has a time limit.
legal.faqAnswer5: Daily challenges reset at midnight UTC. Everyone gets the same challenge each day, so you can compete fairly on the global leaderboard.
legal.faqQuestion6: How can I report a bug or suggest a feature?
legal.faqAnswer6: Visit our Contact page to reach out. We appreciate all feedback and work to improve the game based on player suggestions.
